title: 'Cricket doesn't exist': Ex-B'desh cricketer invites 'all to witness the circus'
description: Bangladesh cricket is facing chaos, with off-field controversies overshadowing the sport. Aftab Ahmed criticised mismanagement, political influence, and media hype, calling it a “circus.” The cricket board’s dissolution and a politically linked new committee added to concerns. He mocked the situation, saying it’s more spectacle than sport, adding: “Cricket doesn’t exist anymore; the circus does.”

What Meta AI head Wang said to those calling Muse Spark AI model 'disappointment'
description: Meta's new AI model, Muse Spark, powering its AI assistant, has drawn criticism for prioritizing benchmarks over real-world utility.  While Meta acknowledges performance gaps, it highlights user satisfaction in areas like visual coding and reasoning.  This initial model, designed for speed and capability, is set to power Meta's platforms soon.

title: No trace of Pawan Khera; Banjara Hills home barricaded
description: Pawan Khera remains untraceable as Assam Police search for him in Hyderabad regarding alleged defamatory remarks against Himanta Biswa Sarma's wife. Khera's Hyderabad residence is under heavy police watch, while he has moved the Telangana High Court seeking anticipatory bail.

title: 'Dhurandhar 2' box office collection Day 21: Ranveer Singh starrer dips under Rs 10 crore
description: Aditya Dhar's 'Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge' continues its record-breaking spree, crossing Rs 1,000 crore net in India and achieving a worldwide gross of Rs 1,653.67 crore. Despite a slight dip on its 21st day, the film has secured a spot in the top 10 highest-grossing films globally for 2026, marking a significant international triumph for Indian cinema.

title: After failed record supermarket merger, Albertsons cuts jobs, says AI is helping operations
description: Grocery giant Albertsons is significantly cutting back its physical stores and workforce nationwide following the collapse of its proposed merger with Kroger. Facing intense competition, the company has already closed around 20 locations this year, with more slated for closure across various states. This restructuring aims to streamline operations and adapt to market pressures.

title: Megan Thee Stallion opens up on mother’s death amid Klay romance
description: The Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson, has proven his love and loyalty towards the popular Grammy winner, Megan Thee Stallion, for close to a year of their high profile romance. While Megan Thee Stallion and Klay Thompson seem happy together, the popular artist had gone through a lot in her life, including witnessing her mother’s brutal death in 2019.

title: Serena Williams shares rare Easter photos, opens up on motherhood
description: Serena Williams shared rare Easter photos with Alexis Ohanian and daughters Olympia and Adira, calling family time everything. She also spoke on Today about motherhood, her daughters’ personalities, and learning to balance attention between them. Her words and photos showed a simple, honest side of life after tennis, focused fully on family and everyday moments.

title: Quote of the Day by Elizabeth Bishop, 'One shouldn't get too involved with people who...'
description: Elizabeth Bishop was a renowned 20th-century poet. Her clear writing and sharp observations left a lasting mark. Bishop's life, marked by early loss and extensive travel, deeply influenced her work. She focused on detailed descriptions and imagery, letting emotion emerge through observation. Her poems explored themes of belonging and the human condition.
